name: MSI PRO B660M-P DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-4600+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Slot - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - D-Sub - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 1.4 - Realtek GbE LAN (PROB660MPD4)
shortName: MSI PRO B660M-P DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro ATX Intel B660 professional motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4-4600 and DisplayPort 1.4.
